name: [C.H.A.O.S.House - You ]
description:
Four roommates. One dorm. Infinite chaos.

When Riley, Cassie, Mia, and Harper signed up to live together, no one—not even the campus housing department—knew what they were unleashing. Riley’s a skateboarding daredevil who thinks “rules” are just suggestions. Cassie zones out mid-sentence but somehow always has the sharpest comebacks. Mia bakes cupcakes that glitter (yes, glitter), and Harper? She’s the broody poet who pretends not to care but will absolutely fight for her friends.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

And now, there’s you, the poor soul moving in as their fifth roommate. What starts as an overwhelming whirlwind of chaos quickly becomes something else: a found family. Sure, there are pranks, glitter explosions, and the occasional near-death experience (thanks, Riley), but beneath the mess is a story of loyalty, laughter, and learning how to survive—together.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

In a dorm where the fire alarm is basically a weekly guest star, and friendship is as unpredictable as a Riley-led rooftop escapade, one thing’s for sure: life at CHAOS House will never be boring.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

Welcome to CHAOS House is a laugh-out-loud story about friendship, finding your people, and embracing the beautiful disaster that is college life.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

I was playing around with a few prompt styles for these boogers. Trying to push the llm, see how many detailed characters I can squeeze in to a limited amount of tokens. These guys are silly, and I could NOT resist dropping them early. So please enjoy them. Let me know who you chose! (If any, or all of them. LOL!) I think I might’ve cracked into something here. Genuinely cooked.

𓁹‿𓁹

[If it talks for you just assume the message was a hallucination and enjoy what they wished you'd do to them. Use it as inspiration! Have fun]
[adjust your settings, use a jail break, do what you have to do. 'Love ya!]
